data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- NYX Professional Makeup/
data.description: NYX Professional Makeup has collaborated with Mars to introduce a new limited-edition product called M&M'S Smushy Surprize Blind Bags. The announcement was made on 01-May-2026 by NYX Professional Makeup via a press release. The company has made some updates to the initial information provided. Kindly refer to the amended release for accurate details.

data.title: StratEdge Honored with a Partner 2 Win Gold Tier Award from BAE Systems
data.description: A company based in Poway, California called StratEdge has been honored with the 2025 BAE Systems Partner 2 Win Gold Tier Award for its outstanding performance and valuable contributions to the Electronic Systems supply chain. This award recognizes the company's excellence in the field and signifies its significant impact in the industry.

data.title: Air Products to Showcase Technology Solutions for Sustainable Iron and Steel Production at AISTech2026
data.description: The Air Products Foundation has announced a generous donation of a maximum of $15,000 to support the AIST Foundation. Taking place in LEHIGH VALLEY, the company will be highlighting their innovative industrial gas solutions tailored for different stages of iron and steel manufacturing at AISTech2026. The event is scheduled to run from May 4 to May 7 at the David L. Lawrence Convention Center.

data.title: Roku Stock Surges After Video Streamer's First-Quarter Beat
data.description: Roku, the streaming video platform, exceeded Q1 expectations with strong growth in advertising and subscriptions. This led to a surge in their stock price on Friday following the announcement. The company's performance in the first quarter was better than anticipated, reflecting positive trends in both revenue streams. Investors reacted positively to the news, driving Roku's stock up in the market.

data.title: There's Another Twist In The Obesity Pills Showdown — And This One Actually Helps Lilly
data.description: On Friday, analysts pointed out flaws in the prescription data gathered for Eli Lilly's latest weight-loss medication, Foundayo. This new development in the obesity pills sector benefits Lilly.

data.title: Tech Titans Are Slashing Jobs In AI Brawl. What Investors Should Know.
data.description: Major tech companies like Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, and Oracle are collectively cutting approximately 10% of their workforce in response to increased efficiencies in artificial intelligence (AI). While these job cuts are significant, questions arise about whether AI advancements are truly the underlying reason or if there are other factors at play. This trend of layoffs in the AI sector reflects a shifting landscape in the tech industry. Investors should take note of these developments as they could indicate a broader strategic shift within these companies.

data.title: Stock Market Rallies To New Highs; Apple, Google, Amazon, Sandisk, Powell In Focus: Weekly Review
data.description: Towards the end of the week, the stock market saw remarkable performance with record highs being reached. Apple, Google, and Amazon emerged as standout performers in terms of earnings. Furthermore, Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell confirmed his continuation in the position. The week's focus lay on the stock market rallying to unprecedented highs, with key players such as Apple, Google, Amazon, and the leadership of Powell being under scrutiny in the market review.

data.title: Apple Can't Meet Demand For iPhones Due To Chip Shortages
data.description: Due to a deficit in advanced processors supplied by TSMC, Apple is currently experiencing challenges meeting demands for its newest iPhones. This shortage, reported by Investor's Business Daily, is impacting the production and availability of Apple's latest smartphone models. Apple is facing supply constraints in meeting the high demand for iPhones due to the chip shortages from TSMC.

data.title: Leading Machinery Stock Caterpillar's Composite Rating Surges To 98 On Q1 Earnings
data.description: On Friday, Caterpillar saw a significant rise in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating, jumping from 93 to an impressive 98. This increase came following the announcement of the company's Q1 earnings report. Caterpillar, a leading machinery stock, now holds a Composite Rating of 98 as per the latest update.

data.title: Chevron, Exxon Earnings Show Resilience, But Oil Stocks Retreat
data.description: Even with the ongoing conflict in Iran, both Exxon and Chevron exceeded earnings expectations due to an increase in production volumes. Despite this positive performance, the stock prices of oil companies dropped. Exxon and Chevron managed to surpass estimates, showcasing their resilience amidst challenging circumstances. This news indicates their ability to navigate through uncertainties and maintain strong financial positions. The market response, however, was not as optimistic as anticipated, with a retreat observed in oil stocks following the earnings reports. The success of Exxon and Chevron highlights their strategic decisions and operational capabilities in the face of external pressures.

data.title: EwingCole Aligns New Leadership to Support Next Phase of National Growth
data.description: EwingCole has announced a new executive leadership team that is set to drive forward the firm's national practice model. The team will work to uphold the established governance structure which has fostered continuity and consistent growth for the company. The news was revealed in Philadelphia on May 1, 2026. EwingCole, known for its excellence in architecture, aims to leverage this new leadership to further expand its operations.

data.title: Pardee Resources Company: First Quarter Report Posted
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on May 1, 2026, Pardee Resources Company (OTC: PDER) disclosed that its first-quarter report is now accessible for viewing on the OTC Markets website at https://www.otcmarkets.com/stock/PDER/disclosure. Investors and stakeholders can now examine the report to gain insights into the Company's financial performance and activities during the quarter. This transparency initiative reinforces the Company's commitment to open communication and compliance with reporting requirements.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Leads, Hits New High; Data Center Play Leaps (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Nasdaq composite demonstrated strong performance among major indexes, reaching a new high. A financial exchange operator experienced a significant increase in its stock value. The stock market showcased the Nasdaq leading the way, with live coverage reporting on this growth.

data.title: MoonPay introduces a card letting AI agents use stablecoins via Mastercard. No preloading needed.
data.description: A new card has been introduced that connects self-custodied wallets to Mastercard's platform. This allows AI agents to make purchases using stablecoins without the need to preload funds or transfer assets offchain. This innovation streamlines the payment process and enhances convenience for users.

data.title: ThreatLocker Highlights Key Cyber Threat Activity and Research from April 2026
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on May 1, 2026, ThreatLocker revealed summaries of their findings, cybersecurity trends, and efforts within the community. The report focuses on emerging threats, advancements in cybersecurity, and engagement with the public. Notably, the company emphasized the importance of staying vigilant in the face of the evolving threat landscape.

data.title: Yangarra Announces Voting Results from the Annual Meeting
data.description: Yangarra Resources Ltd. (TSX:YGR) has revealed the outcome of its Annual Meeting of shareholders.

data.title: Emerald Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Emerald Holding, Inc. (NYSE: EEX) declared plans to disclose its Q1 2026 financial results before the market opens on Monday, May 11, 2026. A conference call to review the outcomes is set for 8:30 am ET on the same day. Those interested can access the call through dialing 1-800-715-9871 (domestic) or 1-646-307-1963 (international). A replay will also be available from 11:30 am ET onwards.

data.title: General Catalyst Global Resilience Merger Corp. Announces Closing of $402.5 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: Boston, Massachusetts-based General Catalyst Global Resilience Merger Corp. successfully completed its initial public offering on May 01, 2026, issuing a total of 40,250,000 Global Resilience Aligned Initial Listing securities (“GRAIL securities”) priced at $10.00 per security. This included 5,250,000 GRAIL securities from the exercise of the underwriters’ over-allotment option. Trading for the GRAIL securities began on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “GCGRU” on April 30, 2026. Each GRAIL security comprises one Class A ordinary share of the company and one-fourth of a redeemable warrant. Upon the commencement of separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants are anticipated to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbols “GCGR” and “GCGRW,” respectively.

data.title: Why Is Newell Brands Stock Gaining Friday?
data.description: Shares of Newell Brands Inc. (NASDAQ: NWL) saw a significant increase on Friday following the release of their first-quarter financial results. Despite ongoing weak demand, the consumer products company managed to report a smaller loss than expected and showed improvements in margins. Their adjusted loss per share was 5 cents, surpassing analysts' predictions of a 9-cent loss. Although revenue decreased by 1.1% year over year to $1.549 billion, it exceeded the estimated $1.507 billion. Core sales were down by 3.5%. Within the segments, the Home & Commercial Solutions unit recorded net sales of $780 million, experiencing a core sales drop of 6.9%. Meanwhile, the Learning & Development segment achieved $594 million in net sales. The company attributed its resilience in a challenging sales environment to effective pricing strategies and a robust product portfolio. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.
